column2: Data is sourced from Integrated Client Services Environment (ICSE), Immigration Records Information System (IRIS) and Travel and Immigration Processing System (TRIPS)
1. Figures given in this report include both primary and secondary visa holders.
2. Figures between 1 and 4 are reported as < 5.
3. Criminal Justice visa holders not included in this report.
4. Bridging visa E (BE) (subclasses 051 and 050) are not included in this report.
5. Subclass not available for Bridging visa category.
6. As of July 2025, this report excludes subclass 449 data.
7. It is important to note that the information used in this report comes from a new data source.
Figures have been revised and may differ slightly from those previously reported.
